Name: The Confidential Agent
Description: Blindly submit a song. Award points based on lucky guesses after all submit and admin reveal the theme.

Name: Live or Die
Description: A song that includes either the word ‘live’ or the word ‘die’ in the title. ‘Live’ as in ‘live album’ doesn’t count.

Name: Proclaim Your Joy
Description: An homage to the cartoon film Inside Out.  Song titles or band names that include any of the five emotions' names: Joy, Sadness, Fear, Disgust, and Anger.  No substitutions.

Name: Nightwatchman
Description: Songs with references to a specific time in the title, such as ""It's a Five O'Clock World"" by The Vogues.

Name: Guitar Lover
Description: A song that includes your favorite guitar solo and a short description of why you love it. Wide open, well apart from the fact it has to have a guitar solo in it.
